flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Missouri-Kansas City rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.2k → $8.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Missouri-Kansas City rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.2k → $30.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Missouri-Kansas City fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Missouri-Kansas City rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (28.5% → 35.3%).
